description: List of payments or accounts in which the heading labels the document as a "חסבת" or conceivably a "חסבה/حسبة" if we disconnect the word from its Arabic idāfa-construction. The term may indicate a "receipt" or simply a "sum" of money which is likely expressed here in alphanumerical figures. The heading states that this "חסבה/حسبة" is connected to one "Yūsuf ibn Salam[?]/יוסף אבן סלם" (probably Sālim or Salīm). Mentions a chest (קומטריא) and carnelians (ʿaqīq) Verso: Letters (or symbols?) in an unidentified script. MCD/ASE
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
